title: Dashboard home + guided pipeline stepper
description: Home tab (default): running jobs, stats, recent finished reels, quick scan action, onboarding empty state. VideoDetail: replace the from/to dropdowns with a Transcribe→Select→Review→Render→Export stepper driven by completed stages; the raw stage-range controls move behind an Advanced toggle.
close_reason: Shipped: dashboard + stepper verified in browser (stats, recent reels, step states, Export→Gallery nav, Advanced disclosure); typecheck + build pass

title: Unified editor workspace: merge VideoDetail + ReelDetail into master-detail editor
description: Selecting a reel no longer navigates to a second page. The right rail switches list<->inspector (details/pipeline/output), the shared timeline gains trim handles + zoomed trim strip, the transcript enters start/end selection mode. Esc deselects; below lg the inspector opens as an overlay panel. ReelDetail.tsx is removed.
close_reason: Shipped: verified in browser — rail swap, timeline highlight/switch, trim strip, transcript chips update shared form, Esc deselect; 93 tests + build + typecheck pass

title: Studio sidebar shell: replace top tabs with left rail + persistent job center
description: Phase 2 of the rebrand (user-selected scope): persistent left sidebar with Library/Gallery/Silence nav, Config+Health as bottom system items (Health gets a failing-checks dot), and an always-visible job center listing active jobs with jump-to-video. Pages/flows unchanged.
close_reason: Shipped: sidebar shell verified in browser at desktop + narrow widths, build/typecheck pass

title: Cinema Dark rebrand: full UI/UX pass over Reels Studio web app
description: Rebrand the whole SPA to the approved Cinema Dark direction (warm near-black surfaces, amber accent, Space Grotesk headings, SVG logomark) plus UX restructure: stage progress bars instead of chip rows, sectioned reel editor, poster-first gallery, grouped config with sticky save, consistent empty/loading/error states. Presentation-only — no API or flow changes. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-19-cinema-dark-rebrand-design.md
close_reason: Implemented, visually verified across all screens in the browser, build+typecheck pass, committed

title: Make the Web UI the only interface (reels = launch Studio)
description: The reels CLI currently exposes run/doctor/web. Decision: the web UI is the only way to drive the pipeline. Remove the run command, make bare 'reels' launch Reels Studio (host/port/config options), keep doctor, promote the web optional-dependency extra into required deps, rewrite README around the web-only flow.
close_reason: Web UI is the only interface: bare reels launches Studio, run/web removed, web deps required, README rewritten

title: README/gitignore: repo must stay agnostic — brand media are user-supplied, never tracked
description: README falsely claimed assets/outro.mp4 and assets/Riser.wav are committed; .gitignore's !assets/** re-includes personal media (and committed assets/.DS_Store). Fix README wording, narrow the ignore exception to fonts, untrack .DS_Store.
close_reason: README no longer claims brand media ships with repo; gitignore exception narrowed to fonts; .DS_Store untracked

title: Silence Remover web tool: remove silent passages from uploaded video
description: Standalone Reels Studio tool (separate from the reels pipeline): upload a video, detect silences with ffmpeg silencedetect, compute keep segments in a pure domain service, re-render with trim+concat, download the result. Design spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-18-silence-removal-design.md

value: Worktree dev setup for Reels Studio: the web app needs input/output/work dirs — symlink them from the main repo (ln -s ../../../input input etc.; note .gitignore's /input/ pattern does NOT match symlinks, so they show as untracked — never commit them). .claude/launch.json defines 'api' (uv run reels :8000) and 'web' (npm run dev --prefix web :5173, proxies /api) for browser preview.
